body.title: Watchlist: Igor-cannot-fix-itself alerting
body.result: Implemented watchlist error logging for unrecoverable external failures (Gmail, SSH, Ollama, budget). Added append_error_watchlist(), read_error_watchlist(), count_error_watchlist() functions. Integrated into get_stats() for dashboard and boot sequence for user notification. Fixed D233 test skipping (needs design approval). All 403 tests pass.
body.description: When Igor hits unrecoverable external failure (Gmail auth, SSH down, Ollama unreachable, budget exhausted), append to ~/.TheIgors/igor_wild_0001/watchlist.md: timestamp, error, attempted fix, suggested action. Dashboard surfaces watchlist_count. Igor reports non-empty watchlist on boot. Files: tools/watchlist.py (new), web/server.py (dashboard), main.py (boot check). S-size.
